name: Cantor Equity Partners VI, Inc.
summary: Cantor Equity Partners VI, Inc. (CEPS) is a blank check company, commonly referred to as a Special Purpose Acquisition Company (SPAC). Its business purpose is to identify and complete a Business Combination with one or more target businesses. The company holds funds in a Trust Account and has not yet commenced operations beyond seeking an acquisition target.
